items.title: Marketing and value fuel McDonald’s strong Q4
items.description: The company’s domestic same-store sales grew 6.8%, while the Grinch Meal set a single-day sales record

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures climb after jobs surprise puts focus back on Fed's rate path
items.description: Markets reacted positively to a strong January jobs report as earnings continue to roll in.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures steady after jobs surprise puts focus back on Fed's rate path
items.description: Markets reacted positively to a strong January jobs report as earnings continue to roll in.

items.title: McDonald's (MCD) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
items.description: McDonald's (MCD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +2.40% and +2.39%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

items.title: McDonald’s Q4 revenue tops estimates as global sales rise 5.7%
items.description: Investing.com -- McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) reported fourth quarter revenue that exceeded analyst expectations, driven by strong comparable sales growth across all segments. The fast-food giant’s shares fell slightly, dropping 1% in after-hours trading on Wednesday.
